subcodes.first_line: O thou daughter of the Kingdom! Thy letter was received and its contents became evident... O thou daughter of the Kingdom! The Lord of the Kingdom and the sun of Truth hath sent forth a splendor
subcodes.subjects: @the divine emanation; the all-pervading bounty of God, @loving one's enemies; returning hatred with love, @walking the spiritual path; spiritual wayfaring; the virtuous life, @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @importance of prayer, @love and unity
